title: Mercedes Sosa studio albums 2000-2009
question: How many studio albums were published by Mercedes Sosa between 2000 and 2009 (included)? You can use the latest 2022 version of english wikipedia.
notes: Reference answer validated from accessible discography pages that list 2003, 2003, 2005, 2008, 2009, 2009 releases.

title: 2016 dinosaur featured article nominator
question: Who nominated the only Featured Article on English Wikipedia about a dinosaur that was promoted in November 2016?
notes: Good Wikipedia navigation case. Requires finding the promoted article, then tracing the nomination page or article history.

title: LibreTexts equine veterinarian surname

title: Polish Raymond to Magda M role
question: Who did the actor who played Ray in the Polish-language version of Everybody Loves Raymond play in Magda M.? Give only the first name.
notes: The actor is Bartlomiej Kasprzykowski; public cast references list his Magda M. role as Wojciech.

title: 1977 Yankees walks leader at-bats
question: How many at bats did the Yankee with the most walks in the 1977 regular season have that same season?

title: Universe Today linked paper support award
question: On June 6, 2023, an article by Carolyn Collins Petersen was published in Universe Today. title: Kuznetzov Vietnamese specimens deposit city
question: Where were the Vietnamese specimens described by Kuznetzov in Nedoshivina's 2010 paper eventually deposited? Just give me the city name without abbreviations.

title: 1928 Olympics least athletes
question: What country had the least number of athletes at the 1928 Summer Olympics? If there's a tie for a number of athletes, return the first in alphabetical order. Give the IOC country code as your answer.
notes: Reference answer derived from the public Olympedia athlete count page for the 1928 Summer Olympics.

title: Taisho Tamai jersey neighbors
question: Who are the pitchers with the number before and after Taisho Tamai's number as of July 2023? Give them to me in the form Pitcher Before, Pitcher After, use their last names only, in Roman characters.

title: Malko competition defunct-nationality recipient
